outcome: All-cause medically attended acute respiratory illnesses (MAARI)
source_quote: During the surveillance period (the RSV season after vaccination), rates of any MAARI were similar between vaccine and placebo groups: 9 of 20 (45%; 90% CI, 26%-65%) vs 7 of 11 (64%; 90% CI, 35%-86%).

outcome: RSV-associated medically attended acute respiratory illnesses (MAARI)
source_quote: The MAARI associated with RSV (all RSV-B) occurred in 1 vaccinee (an LRI) and 2 placebo recipients (1 LRI, 1 URI).
